# testmcpy

> testmcpy is "pytest for MCP servers" — a testing and evaluation framework for Model Context Protocol (MCP) services. It runs YAML-defined test suites against MCP servers using real LLMs (Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama, and more), scores results with 40+ built-in evaluators, and ships both a CLI and a web UI.

testmcpy is open-source software licensed under Apache 2.0, created by Preset, Inc.

- Website: https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy
- GitHub: https://github.com/preset-io/testmcpy
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/testmcpy/

## Core Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/getting-started): Install testmcpy, configure an LLM provider and MCP service, and run your first test
- [Installation](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/installation): Install from PyPI, source, or Homebrew, with optional extras
- [FAQ](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/faq): Comparison with other MCP tools and common troubleshooting

## CLI Reference

- [CLI Overview](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/cli): All commands, global options, and quick examples
- [Setup & Diagnostics](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/cli/setup): setup wizard, doctor, config commands
- [Discovery](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/cli/discovery): tools, profiles, status, smoke-test
- [Running Tests](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/cli/running-tests): run, research, compare, multi-env, CI gating
- [Chat & Serve](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/cli/chat-and-serve): interactive chat, web UI server, TUI
- [Generation & Quality](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/cli/generation): AI test generation, security scan, usability score
- [Benchmarking](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/cli/benchmarking): bench matrix runs, MCP conformance suite
- [Baselines](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/cli/baselines): baseline save/compare/list for regression detection
- [Advanced](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/cli/advanced): mutation testing, metamorphic testing, coverage, exports, badges

## Web UI

- [Web UI Overview](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/web-ui): Launching the UI and page index
- [MCP Explorer](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/web-ui/mcp-explorer): Tool discovery and smoke tests
- [Test Manager](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/web-ui/test-manager): Run YAML test suites with live streaming results
- [Reports](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/web-ui/reports): Unified test results, evaluations, and cost analysis
- [Chat](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/web-ui/chat): Interactive chat with MCP tools
- [Metrics & Comparison](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/web-ui/metrics-and-comparison): Performance analytics and model comparison
- [Health & Security](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/web-ui/health-and-security): Server health monitoring and security scanning
- [Profiles](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/web-ui/profiles): MCP service and LLM provider profile management
- [Auth Debugger](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/web-ui/auth-debugger): JWT/OAuth/Bearer auth flow debugging
- [Config & History](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/web-ui/config-and-history): Settings and AI generation history

## Concepts

- [Architecture](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/concepts/architecture): System design, components, and data flow
- [Test Format](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/concepts/test-format): YAML test definition format, multi-turn tests, load testing
- [Evaluators](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/concepts/evaluators): Complete reference for all built-in evaluators
- [Configuration](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/concepts/configuration): LLM provider and MCP service configuration
- [Authentication](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/concepts/authentication): JWT, OAuth, Bearer, and mTLS auth mechanisms
- [MCP Profiles](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/concepts/mcp-profiles): MCP service profile configuration

## Guides

- [Writing Tests](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/guides/writing-tests): YAML test patterns and evaluator usage
- [Custom Evaluators](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/guides/custom-evaluators): Building domain-specific evaluators
- [CI/CD Integration](https://preset-io.github.io/testmcpy/guides/ci-cd-integration): GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, and gating
